issues.title: Modal container hidden lifecycle
issues.attack: #modal-container has 'hidden' class; innerHTML swap won't make content visible. Inner overlay also duplicates fixed/z-50.
issues.response: Verified. Plan must define open/close lifecycle toggling hidden class.

issues.title: No post-submit response contract
issues.attack: Endpoints return 204+HX-Trigger, rendered partials, or redirects — plan treats all the same with hx-target=#modal-container.
issues.response: Verified against 6 view functions. Each has different success response pattern.

issues.title: project_close GET vs POST conflict
issues.attack: View is @require_http_methods(['POST']) but template uses hx-get. Will 405.
issues.response: Confirmed. Need GET handler for modal form rendering or split into separate endpoint.

issues.title: action_complete/propose_next overlap + due_at
issues.attack: Complete modal has next_action checkboxes duplicating propose_next modal. due_at input not consumed by backend.
issues.response: Verified. action_propose_next reads only next_action_type_ids. Remove checkboxes from complete modal.

issues.title: Filter bar backend gap + phase/status confusion
issues.attack: 종료 is status=closed not phase. Backend doesn't support proposed filters. Template-only change creates false UI.
issues.response: Verified. ProjectPhase only has searching/screening. Must align filter UI with backend capability.

issues.title: Wrong template target for candidate detail
issues.attack: Plan targets candidate_detail.html but actual content renders in candidate_detail_content.html partial.
issues.response: Verified. HTMX navigation renders content partial directly.

issues.title: N+1 optimization path incorrect
issues.attack: select_related on reverse FK is invalid. current_state does additional queries per Application.
issues.response: Verified. Must use Prefetch() and address current_state query pattern.

issues.title: action_skip/reschedule modals omitted
issues.attack: action_item_card.html has skip/reschedule buttons but plan doesn't include these modal templates.
issues.response: Verified. Views exist, templates are stubs. Must include or disable buttons.

issues.title: No accessibility contract
issues.attack: No role=dialog, aria-modal, focus management, max-h/overflow, Escape handling.
issues.response: ACCEPT aria/dialog/overflow/Escape. REBUT focus trap and inert — disproportionate for v1 internal tool.

issues.title: Timeline tab disabled
issues.attack: project_detail.html has timeline tab disabled. Creating partial without enabling tab is unreachable.
issues.response: Verified. Must enable tab and wire hx-get.

issues.title: Partial views missing prefetch
issues.attack: HTMX reload partials need prefetch to avoid N+1 on every trigger.
issues.response: Verified. hx-trigger reloads hit partial views without proper queryset optimization.

issues.title: action_items ordering not specified
issues.attack: Model default ordering is [due_at, created_at]. Timeline needs -created_at.
issues.response: Verified. Must specify ordering per context.

issues.title: ProjectStatus in legacy grep
issues.attack: ProjectStatus is valid current enum, not legacy. Grep check would flag valid code.
issues.response: Verified. Remove ProjectStatus from legacy check targets.
